__doc__: Single source of truth for the BLOG post-kind -> sidebar emoji convention. A blog post's emoji reflects its DOCUMENT KIND (what type of thing it is), NOT its topic, so the Posts sidebar is scannable by type. Set `kind:` in a post's frontmatter; the emoji is auto-derived from this map and prepended to the sidebar label by the draft-docs plugin (authors never type the emoji). Read by validate-blog-kind.js + the validate-blog-kind-hook.sh nudge + the draft-docs plugin. Mirrors the docs emoji system (scripts/lib/emoji-map.json). The reader-facing prose mirror is the blog-kinds terminology doc. Keep them in lockstep: when you add a kind, add it here, in the plugin is automatic (it reads this file), and note it in the terminology doc + the author-blog-post skill.

descriptions.question-set: A set of introspective questions to ask yourself (the 'What I Ask Myself' / 'Questions for' series).
descriptions.framework: A reusable model or framework for thinking about something ('A Framework for', 'The Anatomy of').
descriptions.reflection: A personal essay or set of takeaways ('Notes From', 'What X Taught Me', affirmations).
descriptions.system-design: An architecture or build write-up (system designs, shipping a thing, repo evolution).
descriptions.tutorial: A hands-on, learn-by-doing walkthrough ('A Hands-On Way to', 'Teaching X', 'Running X Locally').
descriptions.reference: A concept explainer or taxonomy ('A Taxonomy of', 'What Does X Mean').
descriptions.event-recap: A recap of a conference or event.
descriptions.legend: A series index or keystone that explains a set of posts and the conventions they share.
